title: hymenophyllum hallierii
intro: Hymenophyllum hallierii is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to survive with minimal water. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum hallierii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and powdering the fronds, which can be used in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
